hits.text: rule: header copy is never inferred from :last-child; actions must be explicit via data-cf-page-header-part="actions" or known action classes.
Older source CSS used `.cf-page-header > :last-child` as action selector.

#root .cf-html-shell .view.active :is([data-cf-page-header="true"], .cf-page-header, .page-head, header.billing-header, header.support-header, header.settings-header, .activity-page-header, .ai-drafts-page-header, .notifications-page-header) :is(button, a.btn, a[role="button"]) s
